title: tanacetum densum subsp. laxum
intro: Tanacetum densum subsp. laxum, also known as alpine pyrethrum or white pyrethrum, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It is a member of the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal and insecticidal properties. The plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are rich in pyrethrin, a natural compound that possesses anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Tanacetum densum subsp. laxum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
